title: canthium triacanthum
intro: Canthium triacanthum, also known as the 'thorny canthium', is a shrub-like plant belonging to the Rubiaceae family, native to tropical Africa. The medicinal properties of Canthium triacanthum lie in its bark, leaves, and roots, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, offering health benefits such as relief from fever, cough, and respiratory infections, as well as aid in wound healing and skin care. Canthium triacanthum is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for its medicinal purposes, and can also be dried and used in capsule or powder form for easier consumption.
